hero.subtitle: React | Laravel | Symfony | Node.js | LLM | APIs

about.description1: Full-Stack Developer passionate about innovation, specializing in robust web solutions and intelligent AI integration (LLM, APIs) to automate and optimize business processes.
about.description2: Currently pursuing a Bachelor's at ECE Paris, I have built my expertise on solid architectures like Laravel and Symfony, while leveraging the flexibility of React and Node.js for modern user experiences.
about.description3: My strength lies in my ability to lead projects end-to-end, combining technical rigor with product vision to deliver scalable and user-centric applications.
